framework: vanilla HTML + React 18 via UMD + Babel standalone (no build step)
font_stack_before: Inter via system-ui fallback (no @fontsource, no next/font)
font_stack_after: Fraunces (display, italic, opsz 144) + Inter (body) + JetBrains Mono (metadata), loaded via Google Fonts <link>
palette_before: hex / rgb hard-coded in :root (Netflix-style dark + #e50914 accent)
palette_after: OKLCH tokens in /tokens.css, sourced from design.md
motion_stance: motion-cut (no framer-motion / gsap / lottie in package.json) — CSS transitions only via tokens
notes: Electron app served by Python server.py on port 8765. Static files live in /public. Detail pages are rendered inside app.jsx by route (window.MEUPLAYER_ROUTE) — no separate detail HTML shells.
